note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

judgment_creditor.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

undefined.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

court_location_town.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

judgment_debtor.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

undefined_2.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

amount_of.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.

tax_returnsw2s_for_the_past.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

proof_of_income_andor_earnings.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.

proof_of_benefits_social_security_social.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.
